title: stenactis septentrionalis
intro: Stenactis septentrionalis, also known as Arctic Marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the Arctic tundra regions of North America and Greenland. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenactis septentrionalis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Stenactis septentrionalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
